4 OR 72

1 OR 47
0 OR 36

Matched
0 OR 36
1 OR 47
2 OR 50
3 OR 61
4 OR 72
5 I 3
6 I 4
7 I 5

Applying to 01110001
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 OR 36 = OR(I 3,I 6) = OR(1,0) = 1
1 OR 47 = OR(I 4,I 7) = OR(0,1) = 1
2 OR 50 = OR(I 5,I 0) = OR(0,0) = 0
3 OR 61 = OR(I 6,I 1) = OR(0,1) = 1
4 OR 72 = OR(I 7,I 2) = OR(1,1) = 1
5 I 3 = 1
6 I 4 = 0
7 I 5 = 0

\boxed{11011100}
